questions.question:
Find out from amongst the four alternatives as to how the pattern would appear when the transparent sheet is folded at the dotted line.
 (X) (1) (2) (3) (4)
questions.explanation: No answer description is available. Let's discuss.
questions.shortcut: Visualize the fold line as a mirror; the pattern reflects across it
questions.trap_type: Folding in the wrong direction or not visualizing the overlap
